name: paper
description: Run screenshot critique loops from local images, notes, and annotated references.

interface.shortDescription: Iterate from screenshots and critique notes
interface.longDescription: Use local screenshot-first workflows to compare the running app against your complaints, tighten UX structure, and patch the code quickly.
defaultPrompt: Use these local screenshots to identify the top UX issue and fix it.
Compare current app screenshots and tell me why the flow feels wrong.
Take this annotated screenshot feedback and implement a tight UI pass.
